title: Migrate to the New Versioned Atlas Administration API
description:
With the introduction of the Versioned Atlas Administration API (referred to
here as /v2), we recommend that you migrate from the Legacy
Atlas Administration API (referred to as /v1) to the new Versioned
Atlas Administration API (/v2).

children.text: Step 1: Specify the number representing the Versioned API in the base  for the resource.
Step 2: Add the versioning  header to requests.
Step 3: Review the changelog to determine the syntax changes for the Atlas Administration API endpoint in the new resource version.
Step 4: (Optional) Migrate the unversioned Atlas Administration API v1.0 Clusters resource to the versioned Atlas Administration API (v2) Clusters resource.
